result.summary: Found 3 major visual issues: text truncation in navigation, game titles cut off on the right side of sections, and carousel arrow partially obscured.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gamm' appears cut off and incomplete, likely should be 'Hot Gaming' or similar
issues.suggestion: Increase the width of navigation tabs or reduce font size to prevent text overflow, or implement text wrapping for longer labels

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge of both 'Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially cut off, with titles like 'MAGNI' and 'HYPER' visible only as fragments
issues.suggestion: Adjust the horizontal scroll or overflow settings to ensure all game cards are fully visible, or use a carousel with proper padding to prevent edge clipping

issues.description: Left carousel navigation arrow in the banner section appears to be partially obscured or cut off
issues.suggestion: Add proper spacing/padding around carousel controls to ensure they are fully visible and clickable without being clipped by parent container
